faqs.question: How much does cockroach extermination cost in East Orange?
faqs.answer: Cockroach extermination in East Orange typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a cockroach problem in East Orange?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to East Orange residents in most cases. Emergency services are available for severe infestations, and we understand the urgency of cockroach problems in residential and commercial properties.

faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in East Orange, NJ?
faqs.answer: East Orange properties most commonly experience German cockroaches, American cockroaches, and Oriental cockroaches. German roaches are particularly prevalent in apartment buildings and multi-family homes, while American cockroaches often enter from sewers and basements in older structures.

faqs.question: Are your cockroach treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and application methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We provide clear instructions for any necessary precautions and can discuss treatment options that meet your specific safety concerns.
